title: epilobium montanum var. lanceolatum
intro: Epilobium montanum var. lanceolatum, also known as Mountain Willowherb, is a variety of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that grows in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Willowherb include its ability to support urinary tract health, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams for topical applications.
